mirowMap.intro: Chłodna and Pereca are a short walk apart. From either, you can be in the Old Town in 10 minutes by metro.

items: Great apartment. Clean, well equipped. One of the very few places I've stayed at that is this well organised.

Excellent! We were delighted. You can see the care put into every detail so that the guest feels at home. Inside it's very cosy with a warm atmosphere. The host also kept in touch easily — you can tell that guests really matter to her.

The flat was in perfect condition and had everything you might need, and more. The location is excellent — close to the metro, the coach station, the market, 20 minutes on foot from the historic centre.

Everything has been thought through down to the smallest detail. There's everything you need, and then some. Very detailed check-in instructions — it all went smoothly. Many thanks to the host for the cleanliness and the care for travellers.

mirowCallout.intro: Hala Mirowska, Browary Warszawskie, Fabryka Norblina. The first 600 metres of a walk are enough to understand why people end up staying longer than they planned.

seo.title: Short-term apartment rentals in Warsaw — comfort and convenience in the city centre
seo.intro: Looking for the perfect place for a short stay in Warsaw? We specialise in short-term apartment rentals in the best locations of the capital. We offer modern apartments that give you comfort, privacy and easy access to the city's main attractions.
seo.why1Rest: — our apartments are in central Warsaw, always close to a metro station.
seo.why2Rest: — every apartment is fully furnished with Wi-Fi, air conditioning and a kitchenette.
seo.explore: Short-term rentals are ideal for both tourists and business travellers. Discover the beauty of Warsaw — the Old Town, the Palace of Culture, the Royal Łazienki — everything within reach.
seo.yourPlaceTitle: Our apartments — your place in Warsaw
seo.yourPlace: In our apartments we take care of every detail so that our guests have a stay they'll remember.
seo.contact: Book your apartment in Warsaw and enjoy a comfortable stay in the capital. Check our offer and book in just a few minutes.

mirowPage.heroSubtitle: Mirów is the district where a 19th-century market hall sits next to post-industrial food courts, and the M2 metro takes you to the Old Town in five minutes.
mirowPage.editorialLead: A city centre with a soul — and the metro right under your feet.
mirowPage.editorialPara1: Mirów stretches between Hala Mirowska and Rondo ONZ. It's the piece of Warsaw that survived from between the wars, made it through to today with a few traces of the old Jewish quarter, and now neighbours the newest chapter of the capital's business growth.
mirowPage.editorialPara2: For a guest that means one thing: a 5-minute walk and you're either in a food court with 20 concepts, or in a post-industrial complex with a cinema and a museum, or buying flowers at the market. Quiet in the evening, coffee close by in the morning.

halaMirowska.name: Hala Mirowska
halaMirowska.blurb: 19th-century market hall. Veg, cheese, flowers and cafés in one place.

browary.name: Browary Warszawskie
browary.blurb: Open courtyard with 20+ food concepts and terraces.

norblina.name: Fabryka Norblina
norblina.blurb: Former factory now a complex with a museum, cinema, food hall and shops.

halaGwardii.name: Hala Gwardii
halaGwardii.blurb: The second market hall next to Hala Mirowska — today a food court with bars, dumplings and platters.

metro.name: Rondo ONZ metro
metro.blurb: Line M2 goes straight to the Old Town and across the Vistula to Praga.

centralna.name: Warsaw Central Station
centralna.blurb: The main station — direct trains to Kraków, Berlin and Gdańsk.

zloteTarasy.name: Złote Tarasy
zloteTarasy.blurb: Warsaw's largest shopping centre, cinema and food court.

chopin.name: Chopin Airport
chopin.blurb: The SKM commuter train runs from Centralna in 20 minutes.

stareMiasto.name: Old Town
stareMiasto.blurb: Market Square, the Royal Castle and the Barbican in one walk.

bulwary.name: Vistula Boulevards
bulwary.blurb: Summer evenings — Warsaw at its best.

muzeumPowstania.name: Warsaw Uprising Museum
muzeumPowstania.blurb: One of the capital's most acclaimed museums.

placZbawiciela.name: Plac Zbawiciela
placZbawiciela.blurb: A nightlife hub — cafés and bars open late.

sections.title: Scope of services provided electronically
items: Booking: the customer can book rooms online — choosing dates, number of guests and preferred amenities.
Add-ons: the site lets you order extras such as parking (subject to availability), early check-in, an extra cot, or extra bedding.
Apartment information: details of amenities, house rules and photo galleries are made available.

sections.title: Conditions for using the service
paragraphs: Technical requirements: an up-to-date web browser and a stable internet connection are required to use the portal.

sections.title: Conditions for entering into and terminating service agreements
items: Forming the agreement: the customer enters into the agreement by accepting the terms and confirming the reservation. Confirmation may be delivered electronically.
Termination: the apartment reserves the right to refuse service in case of a breach of these terms by the customer. This may include misuse of the service or inappropriate behaviour.

sections.title: Complaints procedure
ordered: Customers may file a complaint by emailing biuro@inborr.pl. Contact details and a description of the issue are required.
We will review complaints within 30 days of receipt.
In the case of a justified complaint, we may take corrective action or offer appropriate compensation in accordance with applicable law.

sections.title: House rules
items: Smoking is strictly forbidden in the apartment, in any form.
Parties of any kind are strictly forbidden.
Only the number of guests stated at booking may stay in the apartment (max. 4 people).
The booker agrees to use the apartment for residential purposes only and to keep it in the condition in which it was provided.
No changes may be made to the apartment without prior written consent from InBoRR Bożena Rutkowska-Romańczuk.
The apartment may not be sub-let or shared free of charge with anyone else, in whole or in part.

The apartment must be made available promptly to InBoRR or people designated by InBoRR for fault remediation. In the case of significant faults — in particular those threatening neighbouring flats — the owner (Bożena Rutkowska-Romańczuk) has the right to enter the apartment to fix them, including in the booker's absence, while attempting to notify the booker (by phone, SMS and email).

sections.title: Additional information
items: Pets may stay in the apartment, but only after notifying us and receiving consent from the operator (SMS or email confirmation is enough).
Parking may be available subject to availability, as described in the offer. Parking spaces are charged separately.
TV: cable TV and Wi-Fi internet are available.
Quiet hours apply from 22:00 to 06:00.
Reservations are on request and require confirmation.
Full payment is due no later than 14 days before arrival.
Advance bookings require a 30% deposit.
A final cleaning fee of 150.00 PLN per apartment is added to the reservation payment.
Damage to equipment or appliances, lost keys or other items will be deducted from the deposit at 100% of the value of the damaged item.
If damages exceed the deposit, the host reserves the right to pursue compensation through civil proceedings.
Check-in is available from 15:00.
Check-in and check-out times depend on the specific apartment.
Late check-out is on request only.
When checking out of an apartment where keys are provided, please return them to the coded key box in the hallway by the entrance door.

sections.title: Cancellation costs
items: Free cancellation is available up to 21 days before arrival;
Cancellation 20–14 days before arrival: 30% of the stay cost;
Cancellation 13–10 days before arrival: 50% of the stay cost;
Cancellation 9–7 days before arrival: 70% of the stay cost;
Cancellation 6–3 days before arrival: 90% of the stay cost;
Cancellation within 48 hours of arrival or a no-show: 100% of the stay cost.

sections.title: Closing notes
items: We issue VAT invoices for stays.
Please clean the coffee machine's used-capsule container after about 4 brews.
Please don't let the machine sit in water that has overflowed from the capsule container.
A first-aid kit and a fire extinguisher are part of the apartment (in the bathroom cabinet and the kitchen cabinet respectively).
Any pre-existing faults or visible damage must be reported to the host on +48 608 555 713. Failure to report damage is treated as accepting liability for repair costs.

sections.title: Penalties
paragraphs: The following penalties apply in the apartments:
items: breaching the no-smoking rule — 500 PLN;
leaving a pet unattended causing damage or soiling of furniture, carpet or floors — minimum 400 PLN;
accommodating more guests than declared at booking — 400 PLN per undeclared guest;
throwing a party during quiet hours — 1000 PLN.
